Index

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

C

cloakroomTime - Variable in class simulation.Customer
Customer class has a securityTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the security check, a cloakroomTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the cloakroom and a merchTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the merch store.
Clock - Class in simulation
Creates Clock-instances that track time during the simulation.
Clock() - Constructor for class simulation.Clock
Clock constructor.
compareTo(Event) - Method in class simulation.Event
 
conn - Static variable in class simulation.Database
The Connection object used to connect to the database.
connect() - Static method in class simulation.Database
Connects to the database via hardcoded parameters.
controller - package controller
 
Controller - Class in simulation
Controller class is the main class of the simulation, it handles the event queue and the arrival of customers.
Controller(int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class simulation.Controller
Simulation Engine, handles the event queue and arrival classes
counter - Static variable in class simulation.Customer
Customer class has a static counter-value that is used to give each Customer-instance a unique id number.
currentTime - Variable in class simulation.Clock
Current time recorder by the Clock-instance.
customer - Variable in class simulation.Event
The customer involved in the event, represented as a Customer instance.
Customer - Class in simulation
Creates Customer-instances that travel through the simulation.
Customer(boolean) - Constructor for class simulation.Customer
Customer constructor.
customers - Static variable in class view.SimGUI
Creates a new arraylist to hold Customers-instances.
